data.name: Hentai Office
data.detailed_description:
Hentai class - 在辦公室裡解決不同複雜度的謎題。最佳的放鬆解決方案。

遊戲特色

  • 您的女工的 50 種藝術
  • 每位女工 50 項成就
  • 輕鬆的音樂
  • 3種難度模式
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Hentai class 是您不用工作的地方。在美麗女工的陪伴下放鬆。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64-bit Windows 7, 64-bit Windows 8 (8.1) or 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Office
data.detailed_description:
Hentai class - solve puzzles of different complexity in yuut office. The best solution for relaxation.

Game Features

  • 50 arts of your female workers

  • 50 achievements for each worker

  • Relaxing music

  • 3 difficulty modes
data.about_the_game:
Hentai class - solve puzzles of different complexity in yuut office. The best solution for relaxation.

Game Features

data.short_description: Hentai class is a place where you don't have to work. Relax in the company of beautiful female workers.
